description: Updates on the Solana ecosystem, including the conclusion of Grizzly Thon with over 800 project submissions and a proposal to price compute units. The discussion highlights the importance of marketing projects and the ongoing development of the validator startup process.
topic_summary: The video discusses the recent Grizzly Thon hackathon results and a new proposal regarding pricing compute units on the Solana blockchain. It emphasizes community engagement and project visibility.
